title: Enforcing Project Formatting Style
concept: Running automated linters and formatters (like Black or Prettier) inside the sandbox after code generation.

exercises.prompt: What do AST-Aware Codemods help us do?
exercises.explain: AST-Aware Codemods help us apply precise, structural rewrites rather than using risky regex changes.

cards.title: Why Formatting Matters
cards.body: Code formatting is important because it makes your code easy to read and maintain. Consistency helps everyone understand the code better!

cards.title: What is a Linter?
cards.body: A linter is a tool that checks your code for errors and helps enforce a consistent style. It’s like a spell checker for your code!

cards.title: Formatting as Housekeeping
cards.body: Just like keeping your room clean makes it easier to find things, formatting your code properly helps you and others read and understand it easily.

cards.title: Using a Formatter
cards.body: For example, tools like Black (for Python) or Prettier (for JavaScript) automatically format your code to follow specific style guidelines.

cards.title: Myth: Formatting is Unimportant
cards.body: Some people think formatting doesn't matter, but poorly formatted code can lead to misunderstandings and bugs!

cards.title: Before and After
cards.body: Look at how formatting can change code readability.

right.text:
def fun(x, y):
    return x + y

options.text: Adds new features to the code

exercises.explain: A formatter cleans and organizes code to ensure it follows specific style rules, making it easier to read.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Formatting a code with a tool makes it harder to understand.
exercises.explain: False, because formatting a code with a tool makes it clearer and easier to understand.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: A _______ checks code for style and potential errors.
exercises.sentence: A linter checks code for style and potential errors.
exercises.explain: A linter checks code for style and potential errors, helping maintain clean code.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is a popular code formatting tool?
exercises.explain: Black is a popular code formatting tool that helps format Python code into a consistent style.

exercises.prompt: What is the main benefit of using a linter and a formatter together?

options.text: They prevent errors and maintain consistent style
They add new features to your project
They decrease the time taken for coding
They automatically deploy code to production

exercises.explain: The main benefit of using a linter and a formatter together is that they help prevent errors while maintaining a consistent style, making your code cleaner and easier to understand.
